message:
test(fnp-python): extend linalg_error_surface_probe with eigvalsh / eigh

Added eigvalsh(1-d) and eigh(1-d) probes. cod's recent native fast
paths (76b5855, afd2ecd) correctly fall back to numpy.linalg on Err,
preserving LinAlgError. Probe now covers 9 linalg paths:
inv, svd, svdvals, qr, linalg_eig, slogdet, matrix_rank, solve,
eigvalsh, eigh.
